idea-plugin.name: madeofcode
idea-plugin.description:
madeofcode — a dark theme on a deep indigo background with vivid, high-contrast accents. Reproduces the TextMate theme madeofcode across JetBrains IDEs, theming both the editor syntax and the full IDE UI.

After installing, select madeofcode under Settings → Appearance & Behavior → Appearance → Theme.
idea-plugin.change-notes: • 1.0.0 — Initial release: IDE theme + matching editor color scheme.
